mechanism_narrative: A persistent increase in the federal funds rate raises the risk-free discount rate, compressing the present value of future equity cash flows and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in rising rate periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the labor market acts as a leading indicator of earnings contraction, causing equity valuations to reprice downward within one week of the threshold breach.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.3 percentage points in 1 month
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or the signal's directional accuracy drops below 52% over a 3-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in industrial production and housing starts signals robust aggregate demand outpacing supply constraints, driving corporate revenue growth expectations and yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces a negative or statistically insignificant Rank IC (< 0.02) over any 12-month rolling window, or forward returns do not exceed the baseline median by at least 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: In a supply-constrained environment, sustained growth in the industrial production index reflects pricing power and margin expansion for industrial and technology sectors, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns in high INDPRO growth periods are not significantly higher than low growth periods (t-test p > 0.05), or the signal's predictive power vanishes when CPIAUCSL exceeds 4.0% annualized.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales and consumer spending data directly boost near-term earnings expectations for consumer discretionary and staple sectors, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent week.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in rising RSAFS periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When monthly CPI readings breach a 4.5% annualized inflation threshold, markets price in prolonged monetary tightening and compressed real yields, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or the signal's directional accuracy drops below 52% over a 3-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in nonfarm payrolls and real GDP signals a self-reinforcing economic expansion that supports corporate earnings revisions, yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces a negative or statistically insignificant Rank IC (< 0.02) over any 12-month rolling window, or forward returns do not exceed the baseline median by at least 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle expansion regime, a sustained decline in housing starts signals weakening consumer confidence and credit tightening, causing equity markets to reprice downward within one week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day forward returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or the signal's directional accuracy drops below 52% over a 3-year out-of-sample test.
